from source import sqrt
import math

def test_sqrt_newton_raphson_convergence():
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    expected = math.sqrt(2)
    assert abs(result - expected) <= 0.01, \
        f"sqrt(2, 0.01) returned {result}, expected within 0.01 of {expected}"
